summary: Comprehensive testing of MEN'S HOUSE BARBER booking application completed successfully. Full end-to-end booking flow working, admin system operational, and excellent black/white design implementation.

minor_issues.issue: No available slots returned for Sunday dates (expected behavior - Sunday is closed by default)
minor_issues.impact: Booking system correctly shows no availability on closed days

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and services preview
Complete 5-step booking flow (service → date → time → contact → confirmation)
Services page displays all services with prices and booking buttons
Admin dashboard shows correct stats and today's appointments
Admin services CRUD operations (create, edit, delete services)
Admin appointments management with calendar navigation
Backend API health and all CRUD endpoints
Working hours and salon settings management
Black and white design aesthetic implementation
